## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] UI / styling change

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested my change in the browser
- [ ] I played a full game (win **and** lose) without errors
- [ ] I verified it works in **all three themes** (day / dusk / night)
- [ ] I verified it works at **mobile width**
- [ ] The **Perfect** AI is still unbeatable from the standard start
- [ ] No new dependencies or build step were introduced
- [ ] The code matches the existing style
